name: whatsapp_get_message_status
description: Check the delivery status of WhatsApp messages. Track whether messages have been sent, delivered, read, or failed.

message_id.description: Message ID returned from send message functions (e.g., 'wamid.HBgLMTQxNTU1NTI2NzEVAgARGBI5QjQ5QjY5QjY5QjY5QjY5')

fields.description: Fields to include in the response

message_id.description: Auto-extract message ID from whatsapp_send_message results

status_codes.sent: Message has been sent to WhatsApp servers
status_codes.delivered: Message has been delivered to the recipient's device
status_codes.read: Message has been read by the recipient

notes: Message IDs are returned when sending messages
Status updates may take time to propagate
Read receipts are only available for business-initiated messages
Failed messages may have error details in the response
Message status is available for 30 days after sending
